title: Liquid Detection Component
description: The definitions for how a block behaves when detecting liquid.

can_contain_liquid.description: Whether this block can contain the liquid. For example, if the liquid type is 'water', this means the block can be waterlogged.

detection_rules.description: List of detection rules. Only one rule definition is allowed per liquid type - if multiple are specified, the first will be used and the rest will be ignored.

liquid_type.description: The type of liquid this detection rule is for. Currently, 'water' is the only supported liquid type.

on_liquid_touches.description: How the block reacts to flowing water.

stops_liquid_flowing_from_direction.description: When a block contains a liquid, controls the directions in which the liquid can't flow out from the block.

use_liquid_clipping.description: Whether this block uses the encompassing collider to visually clip the liquid.
